historicalInsights: Sidebar auto-expansion when clicking nav tabs on a collapsed sidebar provides much higher UX coherence than forcing a manual expansion.
Decoupling canvas/generative overlays to accept partial motionConfig structures allows independent rendering states during static and composition playbacks.
Zoom-to-mouse-position requires offsetting the camera coordinates proportionally to the delta zoom and target canvas bounds to prevent layout drift.
Session 7 [Keyboard Shortcuts & Accessibility]: 0 erros, 4 achados UX, FPS=47. TOP: Composition timeline not found or not visible — main workflow broken.
Session 8 [Typography Engine & Text Layer UX]: 0 erros, 4 achados UX, FPS=74. TOP: Composition timeline not found or not visible — main workflow broken.
Session 9 [Generative Shapes & Canvas Interaction]: 0 erros, 1 achados UX, FPS=57. Sem achados críticos novos.
Session 10 [Library Panel & Asset Management]: 0 erros, 0 achados UX, FPS=56. Sem achados críticos novos.

Session 11 [Interface Restructure & UX Overhaul]: Identified 10 critical UX issues. Removed duplicate Export+AddText buttons from TopToolbar. Consolidated Resolution/FPS to ExportPanel only. Added layer list with delete to CompositionPanel. Added file import button to LibraryPanel. Standardized language to PT-BR throughout. Status bar now shows autosave + resolution. Nav badges removed. All in a zero-error build.
Breadcrumb-style toolbar context (App / Panel / Sub-section) is far clearer than showing the panel name in a single element — aligns with Figma patterns.
Group hover via CSS .parent:hover .child-btn { opacity: 1 } is cleaner and more performant than React state for transient UI reveals like delete buttons.
Semantic <button> elements should always be used for interactive actions — using <div onClick> for the render button was an accessibility anti-pattern.
When a feature is duplicated across sidebar nav and toolbar, always keep it ONLY in the sidebar nav to reduce cognitive load and keep the toolbar focused on canvas-context tools.
resolvedBugs: Added missing theme custom properties: --color-bg-base and --radius-full to prevent inputs, panels and timeline borders from rendering with incorrect fallback color definitions.
Corrected static export/loading indicators by introducing keyframes for @keyframes spin.
Fixed ESLint error on accessing isResizing ref during render by wrapping it in sidebarResizing state.
Resolved empty library sidebar panel by correctly mounting LibraryPanel under the library layout tab.
Fixed missing NoiseChannel import and type assertions for override configurations in GenerativePreview.
Configured custom geometry sliders for Squares, Hexagons, Stars, Concentric lines, and Spirographs in GenerativePanel.
Integrated hardware-accelerated WebCodecs with audio stream copy muxing in FFmpeg.wasm, bypassing slow software video recoding fallback.
Implemented premium watermark toggle checkbox and config filters in ExportPanel and exportPipeline.
Created scrub muting state on timeline playhead movements in CompositionTimeline and AudioEngine.
Resolved scaling jump bugs in InteractiveGizmo by linking handles to the active layer's actual scale and rotation values.
[Session 11] Removed duplicate Export button and Add Text button from TopToolbar — both were already accessible via sidebar nav.
[Session 11] Removed duplicate Resolution/FPS fields from CompositionPanel — these now live only in ExportPanel as primary options.
[Session 11] Changed ExportPanel render trigger from <div onClick> to semantic <button> — fixes accessibility anti-pattern.
[Session 11] Standardized all ExportPanel text to PT-BR (was mixed EN/PT).
[Session 11] LibraryPanel: replaced tall category list with compact horizontal chips + added file import button.

pendingIssues.text: Composition timeline data-testid previously missing (now fixed with id=composition-timeline). Recheck if Playwright finds it.
Layer delete button uses both CSS group-hover (.layer-row:hover .layer-delete-btn) AND inline onMouseEnter. CSS approach should take precedence — inline handler can be removed in cleanup session.
CompositionPanel play/pause button calls togglePlayback. GSAP ticker drives the actual playback. Need to confirm that the play button state (isPlaying) visually syncs with timeline playhead movement.
